name: Chill
description: Chill wears silver and ice blue armor with a blue long sleeved shirt and pants underneath. She has a silver helmet with small three ice blue horns on the sides. Underneath the helmet, she has blue hair, which is rarely seen. Her eyes are blue as well as her lips. She wields a javelin and shield made of ice.
biography: Chill was the sworn guardian and personal protector of the Snow Queen. As captain of the queen's guard, her many heroic deeds earned her the respect of the entire ice kingdom. But when the Cyclops army began to expand their empire into the northern realms, the Snow Queen was taken prisoner during her watch and Chill has never forgiven herself for letting it happen. Ashamed and embarrassed, she left the Ice Kingdom behind and sworn never to return until she could reclaim her honor. Now as a member of the Skylanders, she remains courageous and strong, while always on the lookout for her lost queen.
personality: As captain of the Queen's guard, Chill was once the most feared and respected of all the people in the Ice Kingdom. She is a proud, noble warrior - but not afraid to play dirty.

story.content: As sworn guardian of the Snow Queen and captain of the guard, Chill held an important position in the Ice Kingdom she called home. Loved by some, feared by others, respected by all, she was a legend in the making until the day a cyclops army kidnapped the queen when Chill wasn't looking. Heartbroken and ashamed, Chill abandoned the Ice Kingdom and set off to win back the respect and admiration she had lost. In order to regain her honour, Chill is determined to track down the missing queen, but so far all her searching has proven to be in vain. As a member of the Skylanders, Chill feels she has found purpose again. Whether impaling enemies on her javelin, freezing them in blocks of ice, or simply dropping a massive narwhal on their heads, she is pleased to be protecting the innocent once more. But Chill has never stopped searching for her queen. And she never will. Unless she finds her, obviously.

content: I came, I saw, I conquered!
Is it cold in here? Or is it just me?

trivia: Chill, Freeze Blade, Slam Bam and King Pen are the only four Skylanders who have ice abilities.
She and Slam Bam are both the only Water Skylanders with legendary counterparts. both of which first appeared in Giants.
She, Slam Bam, Freeze Blade, Grave Clobber and Dive-Clops are the only five Water Skylanders not based on aquatic creatures.
On some variants of her Series 1 figures, her lips are painted purple instead of blue.
In Giants' early development, some of Chill's upgrades/abilities were differently named and arranged.
She says her call 'Narwhal!' In three different tones.
Because her ears are hidden under her helmet, Chill's exact species is unknown.
It's unlikely that she is an elf, however, as the known elves with irises have dark pupils.
Chill's hair is blue. This can be seen by the viewers if you look closely in the 3DS version of Skylanders: Giants and in Skylanders: Cloud Patrol.
However, on her toy version, you can see a little bit of her hair under the helmet, and it somehow appears to be blonde.
In early development, Chill was called Ice Sorceress. She spoke in a high-pitched voice, and her original catchphrase was 'Let's break the ice!'.
She, Doom Stone, Ignitor, Chop Chop, Flip Wreck, Wildfire, and High Volt are the only Skylanders who use shields.
She speaks with a thick Russian accent.
Chill is voiced by Julie Nathanson, who is the third voice of Belle from Beauty and the Beast.
Her quote 'Chill power' may be a pun on 'will power.'
She, Tidepool and Rip Tide are the only three Water Skylanders who can summon cetacean allies to attack. Chill calls forth the narwhal to ram into enemies.
In Giants, Swap Force and Trap Team, in the image for Call the Narwhal, two penguins can be seen riding the narwhal.
It is possible that the face on Blizzard Chill's shield is the face of the Snow Queen she guarded.
For unknown reasons, Chill's Series 2 Counterpart appears as a separate variant in Skylanders: Lost Islands.
In Lost Islands, Chill mentions that Icicle Isle reminds her of her father, whom she called 'Pop-Cicle.'
Chill traverses water in Giants by levitating over its surface.

trailers.name: Skylanders Giants - Chill Preview Trailer (Stay Cool)
Skylanders Giants - Chill's Soul Gem Preview (Stay Cool)

gameplay: Chill is a versatile Water Skylander who excels at both defense and offense. She utilizes ice javelins for ranged combat and can create ice walls to block enemies or provide cover. Her unique ability to summon a narwhal provides high burst damage, while her shield-based upgrades allow her to block incoming attacks effectively. In her Series 2 form, she gains the ability to launch mini orcas from her ice walls for additional crowd control.

basic.name: Ice Javelin
basic.content: Press the Attack 1 button to throw a spinning ice javelin.

basic.name: Ice Wall
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to summon a wall of ice blocks. Can use for protection or to knock back enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: The Great Wall
basic_upgrades.content: Hold Attack 2 to extend the length of an ice wall.

basic_upgrades.name: Glacial Bash
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 to bash enemies and ice wall blocks with your shield.

basic_upgrades.name: Cold Front
basic_upgrades.content: Hold Attack 3 to keep the shield raised and block attacks from the front.

soulgems.name: Call The Narwhal!
soulgems.content: Hold Attack 1 to charge and summon a narwhal friend!

wow_pows.name: Orcastration!
wow_pows.content: Hold Attack 2 longer and mini orcas appear inside the ice wall, then release to shatter the wall and launch orcas.

abilities.name: Brrrr Blade
abilities.content: New ice javelin does increased damage.

abilities.name: Shatterspear
abilities.content: Javelins now split into separate ice spears when passing through an Ice Wall.

abilities.name: Triple Javelins
abilities.content: Throw three ice javelins at once.

abilities.name: Ice Breaker
abilities.content: Ice Wall blocks explode when struck by an ice javelin or by an enemy.

abilities.name: On the Rocks
abilities.content: Exploding ice blocks freeze enemies into ice cubes of their own.

abilities.name: Better Bash
abilities.content: Glacial Bash hits multiple enemies and Ice Wall blocks in a larger area.
